title: Non GATE CSE - Distributed Computing - Distributed Computing

questions.question:
Consider the following statements :

I. Re-construction operation used in mixed fragmentation satisfies commutative rule.

II. Re-construction operation used in vertical fragmentation satisfies commutative rule Which of the following is correct ? 



Distributed Computing: UGC NET CSE | December 2014 | Part 3 | Question: 11

In a distributed computing environment, distributed shared memory is used which is 



Distributed Computing: UGC NET CSE | December 2014 | Part 3 | Question: 54
options: Logical combination of virtual memories on the nodes.
Logical combination of physical memories on the nodes.​
Logical combination of the secondary memories on all the nodes.
questions.correct_answer: Logical combination of physical memories on the nodes.​

questions.question:
Object Request Broker (ORB) is

I. A software program that runs on the client as well as on the application server.

II. A software program that runs on the client side only.

III. A software program that runs on the application server, where most of the components reside. 



Distributed Computing: UGC NET CSE | June 2014 | Part 2 | Question: 27
